languages.text: "Чрезвычайно отрадно, что вы разделяете мою позицию!" {n}Звучный, вибрирующий голос Эоганна наполняется энтузиазмом. Разряд вырывается из гальванической батареи в его чреве, рассыпая вокруг синеватые искры.{/n} "Буду надеяться, что вы разделите со мной этот триумф, Вольный Торговец. Я с удвоенным рвением примусь за исследования".

"It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."
languages.original_text: "Чрезвычайно отрадно, что вы разделяете мою позицию!" {n}Звучный, вибрирующий голос Эоганна наполняется энтузиазмом. Разряд вырывается из гальванической батареи в его чреве, рассыпая вокруг синеватые искры.{/n} "Буду надеяться, что вы разделите со мной этот триумф, Вольный Торговец. Я с удвоенным рвением примусь за исследования".

I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

"It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

"It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

languages.text: "Es ist extrem erfreulich, dass Ihr meine Position teilt!" {n}Eogunns sonore, vibrierende Stimme klingt enthusiastisch. Eine Entladung bricht aus der galvanischen Zelle in seinem Bauch hervor und sendet blaue Funken in alle Richtungen.{/n} "Ich hoffe, Ihr werdet diesen Triumph mit mir teilen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde mich mit doppeltem Eifer wieder meiner Forschung widmen."
languages.original_text: "It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist extrem erfreulich, dass Ihr meine Position teilt!" {n}Eogunns sonore, vibrierende Stimme klingt enthusiastisch. Eine Entladung bricht aus der galvanischen Zelle in seinem Bauch hervor und sendet blaue Funken in alle Richtungen.{/n} "Ich hoffe, Ihr werdet diesen Triumph mit mir teilen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde mich mit doppeltem Eifer wieder meiner Forschung widmen."

languages.text: « Je suis ravi que vous partagiez mon opinion ! » {n}s'exclame Eogunn d'une voix forte et enthousiaste. Une décharge s'échappe de la cellule galvanique dans son abdomen, envoyant des étincelles bleues dans toutes les directions.{/n} « J'espère que nous pourrons nous réjouir ensemble de mon triomphe, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je compte redoubler d'efforts dans mes recherches. »
languages.original_text: "It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis ravi que vous partagiez mon opinion ! » {n}s'exclame Eogunn d'une voix forte et enthousiaste. Une décharge s'échappe de la cellule galvanique dans son abdomen, envoyant des étincelles bleues dans toutes les directions.{/n} « J'espère que nous pourrons nous réjouir ensemble de mon triomphe, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je compte redoubler d'efforts dans mes recherches. »

languages.text: “您与我立场一致，这实在令人振奋！”{n}伊奥贡洪亮而震颤的声音中充满热情。腹部的原电池爆发出一阵电流，蓝色火花四散飞溅。{/n}“我希望您能与我共享这一胜利，行商浪人。我将以加倍的热情投身我的研究。”
languages.original_text: "It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

traits.locale_text: “您与我立场一致，这实在令人振奋！”{n}伊奥贡洪亮而震颤的声音中充满热情。腹部的原电池爆发出一阵电流，蓝色火花四散飞溅。{/n}“我希望您能与我共享这一胜利，行商浪人。我将以加倍的热情投身我的研究。”

languages.text: «¡Es extremadamente gratificante saber que comparte mi posición!». {n}La voz de Eogunn, sonora y vibrante, retumba con entusiasmo. Una descarga brota de la célula galvánica de su abdomen, esparciendo chispas azules en todas las direcciones.{/n} «Espero que comparta este triunfo conmigo, Comerciante Independiente. Redoblaré mis esfuerzos investigativos».
languages.original_text: "It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."

traits.locale_text: «¡Es extremadamente gratificante saber que comparte mi posición!». {n}La voz de Eogunn, sonora y vibrante, retumba con entusiasmo. Una descarga brota de la célula galvánica de su abdomen, esparciendo chispas azules en todas las direcciones.{/n} «Espero que comparta este triunfo conmigo, Comerciante Independiente. Redoblaré mis esfuerzos investigativos».

languages.text: "私と同じ立場であることを大変うれしく思います！"{n}エオガンヌの響くような、振動するような声は熱意に満ちている。腹のガルバニック電池から放電が起こり、青みがかった火花が飛び散る。{/n}「フリー・トレーダーよ、あなたの言う勝利を私も分かち合いたい。研究への意欲は倍増するよ」。
languages.original_text: "It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eoghanne's sonorous, vibrating voice fills with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic battery in his belly, scattering bluish sparks all around.{/n} "I would hope to also share in the triumph you describe, Free Trader. I'll be doubly eager to get to work on the research."

languages.text: "Duruşumu paylaşmanız son derece sevindirici!" {n}Eogunn'un çınlayan, titreşen sesi coşkuyla yankılanıyor. Karnındaki galvaniz hücreden bir salınım yayılıp her tarafa mavi kıvılcımlar saçıyor.{/n} "Umarım bu zaferi benimle paylaşırsınız Hür Tacir. Araştırmalarıma iki katı şevkle sarılacağım."
languages.original_text: "It is extremely gratifying that you share my position!" {n}Eogunn's sonorous, vibrating voice rings with enthusiasm. A discharge bursts from the galvanic cell in his abdomen, sending blue sparks scattering in every direction.{/n} "I hope you will share in this triumph with me, Rogue Trader. I will apply myself to my research with redoubled zeal."
